data.title: GRVT Brings Top Experts Onboard to Secure and Scale 2025
data.description:
GRVT, the world's first regulated decentralized exchange (DEX), has recently announced the appointment of Chris Thomas as Head of Blockchain & Corporate Security and Suren Markosov as Head of Quantitative Research.
source: https://coincu.com/322308-grvt-brings-top-experts-onboard-to-secure-scale

data.title: Intent-based solutions can fix DeFi liquidity
data.description:
Intent-based solutions offer a promising approach to tackle DeFi’s liquidity fragmentation, simplifying crosschain interactions and enhancing user experience.

data.title: WeChat Tests AI Search Feature
data.description: According to PANews, WeChat is currently conducting a trial of its new 'AI Search' feature. Some users can access this feature by navigating to the search page and selecting the 'Deep Thinking' option, powered by DeepSeek-R1.

data.title: Greeks.live: Bitcoin traders are closely watching the $94,000-98,000 range, with the main resistance at $98,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Greeks.live macro researcher Adam released an English community briefing saying that Bitcoin traders are closely watching the $94,000-98,000 range, with the main resistance level at $98,000. At the same time, many people have noticed that volatility has been unusually low recently and there is a lack of certainty in price trends. There is a growing consensus in the market that volatility in short-dated options could see a significant expansion from the current 17% level, with a clear split between those who advocate taking aggressive positions in a low volatility environment and those who advocate waiting for clearer direction.

data.title: Bitcoin Short Term Investors Now Hold Over 4M $BTC. Can BTC Bull 100x?
data.description:
Short term Bitcoin holders (STHs) have been aggressively adding the OG cryptocurrency to their portfolios since September 2024, adding over 1.5M BTC. This takes the total tally of Bitcoin with STHs to 4M. In case you didn’t know, short-term holders are those market participants who hold the token for less than 155 days. Can Short-Term Holders Buy More $BTC? Interestingly, all of the previous...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin-short-term-investors-now-hold-over-4m-btc-can-btc-bull-100x/

data.title: Pi Mainnet is Here! How to Sell Out Your Pi Coins in 2025 (Easy Steps)
data.description:

data.title: Traders Show Caution Amid Low Market Volatility
data.description: According to PANews, Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, shared insights in a Chinese community briefing, highlighting traders' cautious outlook on the current market trends. The market's implied volatility (IV) is at an unusually low level. While some traders view this as an opportunity to buy volatility, others express concerns about potential market weakness over the weekend.

data.title: In the past 24 hours, the entire network has liquidated $200 million, both long and short positions have exploded
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past 24 hours, the entire network has a liquidation of 200 million US dollars, of which long orders have a liquidation of 101 million US dollars and short orders have a liquidation of 98.3976 million US dollars.

data.title: OM's huge profit address deposited the last 800,000 OM into Binance, which may have earned more than 80 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, the OM huge profit address has recharged the last 800,000 OM into Binance, worth $5.98 million. In the past 15 hours, the address has transferred a total of 11.51 million OM to the trading platform, with a total value of $84.32 million; its cost is $0.2261. If it is estimated based on the average recharge price of $7.32, the sale will make a profit of $81.72 million. Binance data shows that OM's 24-hour trading volume is $858 million, ranking 10th among all tokens.
